response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks direct experience with C++ (primary requirement) or Rust, geospatial data processing, or navigation systems. Their background in distributed systems and low-latency applications is strong, but their recent roles have focused on web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure rather than routing or tiling pipelines. Their open-source GISCollective project demonstrates geospatial interest but not at the required scale or complexity.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications with D, C, and Java
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute to open-source projects
Experience with automation, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices like TDD
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ (primary requirement) or Rust for the routing pipeline
Limited exposure to geospatial data processing or navigation systems at scale
Recent roles have focused on web/mobile development rather than routing data pipelines
